Dynamic Procurement Analytics with AI Key Influencers

Supply Chain Analytics Dashboard
Comprehensive supply chain dashboard tracking 154M revenue, 96M cost, warehouse-level order progress via treemap, channel distribution (Wholesale/Distributor/Export), and product profitability ranking. Features dense time-series inventory level analysis across 3 years.

Power BI · Manufacturing QA · Haier Pakistan
Haier Gas Leakage Quality Intelligence System
Multi-page quality analytics system built for Haier's AC manufacturing division. Tracks 6,735 field complaints across installation, ODAL joints, chocking, valves, and condensers. Includes year-over-year comparison, branch-wise breakdown across Pakistan, DOM trend analysis, and model-wise defect tracking. Directly used by brand reputation and QA departments for corrective action.
-26.7%

Power BI · Production Quality · Haier
Production Leakage Defect Rate Monitoring System
Real-time production quality dashboard tracking defect rates across 4 production lines (Cond MFG, CT, Evap MFG, OD) at Haier's AC factory. Weekly trend tracking in PPM, line-wise defect rate summary tables, welder-wise breakdowns, and shift-level analysis for root cause identification.
MES DataPPM TrackingReal-timeProduction Lines
Power BI · Component Analysis · Haier
Condenser Failure Analysis Dashboard
Detailed component-level quality dashboard analyzing 803 condenser complaints. GI Plate failures identified as top issue (67% of cases). Branch-wise, model-wise, and trend analysis enables precise engineering corrective actions. Directly linked to supplier quality claims and warranty reduction strategy.
803

JAN 2026 – PRESENT

Leading QA operations across assembly, manufacturing, and lab lines. Reduced PDR from 0.055% to 0.045%. Increased Testing Room UPH from 180 to 280 (56% improvement) through Lean Six Sigma. Collaborated with MES development team to automate defect tracking and parts binding.
